## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan experiments for generative AI optimization (GEO) and SEO across client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is developing a catalog of GEO and SEO experiments to run across various clients](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Focus on designing experiments properly, including tracking prompts/keywords beforehand and establishing clear hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Need to identify willing clients with appropriate resources/content for each experiment type](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Goal to create case studies and shareable insights from successful experiments](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### GEO Experiment Planning

  - [Three main experiments in progress:](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
    1.  Reddit posting/seeding discussions (Monograph, AugmentCode)
    2.  LLMs.txt file impact (Smith.ai)
    3.  On-page components for increased citations
  - [Need to design experiments carefully to ensure measurable results](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Aim to start rolling out experiments with customers in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

### Client Selection for Experiments

  - [Criteria for selecting clients:](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
    1.  Willingness to participate in experiments
    2.  Appropriate dev resources (if needed)
    3.  Relevant content/website structure for specific experiments
  - [Identified potential clients: School.ai, Abnormal, Rapid, Smith.ai](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

### SEO Experiment Considerations

  - [Some experiments may overlap between GEO and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Current blocker: SEMrush Enterprise setup for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Alternative metrics can be used (e.g., GA4 for on-page experiments)](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

### Knowledge Sharing and Case Studies

  - [Team recognizes need to better surface and share successful strategies across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Goal to create a knowledge base of experiments and results](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Potential to use insights for external marketing/thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to flag potential experiments and suitable clients in the channel](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Jakub to draft initial experiment designs with hypothesis statements](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Jason to work on unblocking SEMrush Enterprise setup](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Continue surfacing and sharing successful strategies across the team](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Explore ways to organize and potentially automate knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/_s7fXpFrdz2F5qsqddh3knEjwDVgNJrQ?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
